# Benefits Realization Plan

## Purpose
This document defines the expected business benefits of the initiative and how those benefits will be measured over time.

## Guidance for completion
Use specific benefits and measurable KPIs wherever possible. Baseline and target should be agreed with the relevant business owner or product owner. Review cadence should reflect how often results are assessed.

| Benefit | KPI | Baseline | Target | Measure Method | Owner | Review Cadence | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |  |  | Monthly / Quarterly | Planned / In Progress / Achieved |
